{"problem_standardized_math":"Let \\(e=(1,1,\\ldots,1)^T\\), and define the generating set by\n\\[\np_i=\\frac{1}{2n}e-e_i,\\quad i=1,2,\\ldots,n,\\qquad p_{n+1}=\\frac{1}{2n}e.\n\\]\nProve that this generating set satisfies\n\\[\n\\kappa(\\mathcal{D}_k)\\stackrel{\\mathrm{def}}{=}\\min_{v\\in\\mathbf{R}^n}\\max_{p\\in\\mathcal{D}_k}\\frac{v^Tp}{\\|v\\|\\,\\|p\\|}\\ge \\delta\n\\]\nfor some \\(\\delta>0\\), and determine the value of \\(\\delta\\)."}
